message:
fix: prevent zero-bound sprintf buffer overwrite and add generation-tagged TLS entries

- stdio_abi: fix sprintf and vsprintf to skip the pointer copy entirely
  when the destination buffer has zero remaining bytes, preventing a
  write-past-end when bound==0 caused saturating_sub(1) to still attempt
  a null-terminator write at offset 0; record ClampSize healing action
  for the zero-room case
- pthread/tls: replace bare u64 TLS value storage with TlsEntry structs
  carrying a generation sequence number, so that a key created after a
  delete cycle cannot read stale values left by the previous occupant of
  the same slot; encode the sequence in the upper 22 bits of PthreadKey.id
  and validate it on every get/set/delete operation; update ThreadHandle
  and fallback thread-local storage to use the new TlsEntry type

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
